data.title: Geording Machinery reduces SME recycling costs by 30% with new all-in-one shredder, aims to support ESG push.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, in Taichung, Geording Machinery, a reputable company from Taiwan specializing in innovative plastic recycling systems, revealed the worldwide introduction of its Shredder Integrated Recycling Machine. This cutting-edge product is a versatile and comprehensive solution tailored for Small and Mid-sized enterprises.

data.title: EU probes X for alleged failure in controlling illegal Grok AI content rollout, assessing risks, and complying with EU law. #investigation #compliance
data.description: The investigation will assess if the platform properly evaluated the risks associated with Grok's launch and adhered to its obligations under European Union legislation.
Finance Ministry sees Thailand’s 2026 inflation at 0.3%, lower than October forecast of 0.5%

data.title: Treasury Secretary cancels $4.8M contracts with Booz Allen for leaking Trump's tax returns. Stock drops 8%.
data.description: The U.S. Treasury Secretary, Scott Bessent, declared on Monday the termination of all contracts with management consulting company Booz Allen Hamilton Holding Corp. (NYSE: BAH) due to failures in safeguarding sensitive taxpayer data and a previous breach that exposed confidential tax information. The Treasury Department disclosed that it will be canceling all 31 contracts with the firm, representing $4.8 million in annual expenditure and $21 million in total obligations. Bessent characterized this action as part of a broader initiative by the Trump administration to enhance supervision of government contractors and rebuild trust in federal entities. Referring to President Trump's dedication to eliminating wasteful practices, Bessent emphasized that canceling the contracts was a crucial measure in this effort.
SET Index jumps 2% in Thailand trading
JP Morgan upgrades Smiths Group price outlook, raising target to 3,040p

data.title: HKMA and privacy watchdog collaborate for bank fraud probes in Hong Kong. Examinations aim to curb losses after 35,831 cases with HK$6.4B lost in 2025.
data.description: Regulatory authorities in Hong Kong have declared they will be conducting collaborative bank inspections focused on anti-fraud measures following losses totaling HK$6.4 billion from a concerning 35,831 cases of deception reported in 2025. This initiative aims to address the alarming surge in fraudulent activities within the banking sector and enhance protection for consumers.

data.title: GitHub Copilot integrates GPT-5.2-Codex into Visual Studio, JetBrains, Xcode, Eclipse, broadening AI coding reach.
data.description: The latest version of OpenAI's GPT-5.2-Codex, named OpenAI Codex, can now be accessed on various Integrated Development Environments (IDEs) via GitHub Copilot. This move broadens the scope of AI coding solutions for businesses, moving beyond Visual Studio Code. This development represents a significant advancement in AI-powered programming tools, enabling greater accessibility and integration across different software development platforms.

data.title: Polymarket partners with US Major League Soccer for prediction market services, enhancing fan engagement opportunities.
data.description: Polymarket has been selected as the prediction market partner for the US Major League Soccer. The partnership aims to provide fans with new opportunities to interact with the game on a deeper level. This initiative will bring forth innovative prediction market solutions to engage audiences.

data.title: Blighter to exhibit ITAR-free surveillance radars at World Defense Show 2026; emphasizes long-term partnerships and regional contracts.
data.description: Blighter has been successful in securing major regional contracts by offering low power and long-range covert radars. Additionally, their willingness to support technology transfer and local production of these radars has led to the establishment of long-term partnerships. Blighter is set to exhibit its ground-breaking technology at an upcoming event, demonstrating their commitment to innovation in the industry.

data.title: Lightmatter and Synopsys team up to integrate Synopsys 224G SerDes and UCIe IP for 3nm process into Lightmatter’s Passage™ 3D CPO platform, targeting next-gen AI infrastructure.
data.description: A collaboration has been announced between Lightmatter, a photonic computing leader, and Synopsys, a prominent engineering solutions provider, to integrate Synopsys' 224G SerDes and UCIe IP for the 3nm process into Lightmatter's Passage™ 3D Co-Packaged Optics (CPO) platform. This partnership aims to develop a high-performance, low-latency CPO platform that can scale for future AI infrastructure needs. Lightmatter is working on creating a robust solution that will optimize (super) computing capabilities.

data.title: Lightmatter introduces Guide Light Engine with VLSP Tech for AI, leading in photonics, offers higher bandwidths for laser manufacturing.
data.description: In Mountain View, California, Lightmatter, a prominent player in photonic computing, unveiled a significant innovation in laser design known as Very Large Scale Photonics (VLSP). The Guide™ light engine showcases this advancement, establishing the most comprehensive laser platform in the industry with unmatched bandwidth capabilities. This breakthrough marks a shift in laser manufacturing from manual to foundry production, thanks to VLSP technology utilizing extensive photonic integration to address power constraints.

data.title: Lightmatter and GUC collaborate on Co-Packaged Optics for AI hyperscalers, aiming to bring Passage™ 3D CPO solutions to market.
data.description: A strategic collaboration has been revealed between Lightmatter and Global Unichip Corp. (GUC) to introduce commercial Passage™ 3D Co-Packaged Optics (CPO) solutions. Lightmatter, the leading provider of photonic interconnect solutions for AI, and GUC, the Advanced ASIC leader, aim to bring innovative technology to market. This partnership merges Lightmatter’s Passage photonic interconnect with GUC’s cutting-edge ASIC design services. This venture is set to revolutionize hyperscaler AI infrastructure.

data.title: Lightmatter partners with Cadence for optical interconnect in AI infra, developing CPO solutions with SerDes IP.
data.description: In Mountain View, California, Lightmatter, a leading company in photonic computing, revealed a partnership with Cadence to create co-packaged optics (CPO) solutions combining Cadence’s high-speed SerDes IP with Lightmatter’s Passage™ optical engine. The collaboration, emphasizing integration with advanced-node CMOS technology and standard packaging processes, pursues the development of high-performance, production-ready CPO. This initiative may revolutionize the industry by merging cutting-edge technologies to enhance computing capabilities.

data.title: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong forms advisory board to address quantum computing threats in blockchain industry.
data.description: The CEO of Coinbase Global Inc. announced the formation of an advisory board to assess the implications of quantum computing for the blockchain industry and prepare for upcoming threats. The board will consist of distinguished researchers in quantum computing, cryptography, and blockchain systems to ensure proper consideration of quantum threats. Security is highlighted as the top priority, with the CEO emphasizing the significance of anticipating and preparing for future threats. The advisory board will be responsible for publishing research on the matter. This initiative is seen as a strategic move to safeguard the industry against potential risks. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bitwise to introduce onchain vaults through Morpho, offering a 6% APY from over-collateralized lending pools.
data.description: One strategy by Bitwise aims to achieve a 6% annual percentage yield through over-collateralized lending pools in the first vault.
